name: Butterfly

skills.name: Assassination
skills.description: Gains 2 marks from defeating heroes and 1 mark from assisting or killing monsters/minions. When she accumulates 3 marks, the next skill used will not enter cooldown.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies around her and gains a shield. Her Movement Speed increases during this time.

skills.name: Sword Propel
skills.description: Deals damage in the target direction and inflicts slow.

skills.name: Death Dealer
skills.description:
Jumps to the target, dealing damage.
If the target is defeated within a certain time, the skill's cooldown will be reset.

skillsZh.name: 刺殺
skillsZh.description: 刀鋒寶貝擊殺英雄會獲得2層印記，助攻或者擊殺野怪、小兵會獲得1層。疊至3層時，下個施放的技能不會進入冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 半月斬
skillsZh.description: 刀鋒寶貝對周圍造成傷害。獲得一個護盾，期間使自身加速。

skillsZh.name: 擲刀術
skillsZh.description: 刀鋒寶貝朝指定方向造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 暗殺術
skillsZh.description:
刀鋒寶貝跳向指定目標並造成傷害。
若在一定時間內該目標被擊殺，則重置技能冷卻。

tips: Build: Axe of Torment, Destiny, Master Sword.
tipsZh: 刀鋒寶貝（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 51.89%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、名刀・司命、宗師之力.

patchHistory.change: Increased the duration of Ultimate's Mark.
patchHistory.detail: "The Mark from Butterfly's Ultimate is a crucial mechanic. We've increased the duration of the Mark to give her more room for error and better leverage this feature."

patchHistory.change: Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail:
Raised the base damage and bonus multiplier of her Skill 1 and Skill 2.
We've taken notice of the fact that Butterfly has consistently been rather difficult to play as in the current version of the game. Because she is an assassin hero with high mobility, we would like her to be a worthy opponent against the weaker, but still important, enemies. It's for this reason that we have increased the damage dealt by her Skills 1 and 2. We hope that Butterfly will prove to be a more competent fighter in the current season.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 based on her level, and reduced her Ultimate's base cooldown.
patchHistory.detail: Butterfly, who just recently joined Honor of Kings, has excellent mobility and her damage output makes her a popular choice at the start of the game. Although we've reduced some of her skill stats, we hope that she will still be an active part of Hero's Gorge. That is why we reduced her skill cooldown: to ensure she is still powerful in the mid to late game.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 大招的標記是刀鋒寶貝的重要機制，我們提升了印記的持續時間，希望給她更多的容錯空間來利用這個特點。

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提高1技能和2技能的基礎傷害和加成係數
我們發現目前遊戲中，刀鋒寶貝的表現始終不理想。身為一名機動性很強的刺客型英雄，我們希望她能對那些脆弱的關鍵目標造成足夠威脅。因此，我们適度提升了她1技能和2技能所能造成的傷害，希望刀鋒寶貝能在目前賽季有更好的表現。

patchHistoryZh.change: Reduced the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2 based on her level, and reduced her Ultimate's base cooldown.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Butterfly, who just recently joined Honor of Kings, has excellent mobility and her damage output makes her a popular choice at the start of the game. Although we've reduced some of her skill stats, we hope that she will still be an active part of Hero's Gorge. That is why we reduced her skill cooldown: to ensure she is still powerful in the mid to late game.

faqs.question: Is Butterfly good in current season?
faqs.answer: Butterfly is Tier B Warrior with 51.89% win rate, 0.55% pick rate, and 0.07% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Butterfly build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Axe of Torment, Destiny, Master Sword, Pure Sky, Sage's Sanctuary, Blood Rage.

faqs.question: How to counter Butterfly?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun. Strong into Heino, Sakeer, Angela.

faqsZh.question: 刀鋒寶貝 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 刀鋒寶貝 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.89%、選取 0.55%、禁用 0.07%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 刀鋒寶貝 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暗影戰斧、名刀・司命、宗師之力、純淨蒼穹、賢者的庇護、血魔之怒.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 刀鋒寶貝？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun。刀鋒寶貝 克制 Heino、Sakeer、Angela。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Heino, Sakeer, Angela. Weak into: Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 刀鋒寶貝 勝率 51.89%（Camp HOK，2026-06-10）
克制：Heino、Sakeer、Angela；被克制：Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Butterfly is a Medium Warrior (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.4% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Butterfly: Butterfly gains 2 stacks of mark from defeating heroes and 1 stack fromassisting or killing monsters/minions.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Rapacious Bite, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Immovable - Sky Dome, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Butterfly's Warrior kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Whirlwind → Sword Propel → Death Dealer → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Death Dealer (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Sword Propel provides mobility or stick—max first. Whirlwind second for damage. Death Dealer on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Whirlwind → Sword Propel → Death Dealer → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Death Dealer after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Butterfly sits at Tier B globally (52.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Butterfly vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 0.2% more often globally. Choose Butterfly when you need Jungling identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

Butterfly vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Butterfly has +2.2% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Butterfly when you need Jungling identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Butterfly excels into Heino, Sakeer, Angela. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.
